title: verbascum × freynianum
intro: Verbascum × freynianum, also known as Freyn's mullein, is a hybrid plant species within the Verbascum genus. It is known for its medicinal properties, which have been utilized in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Freyn's mullein include its ability to soothe respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and reduce skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Freyn's mullein can be made into teas, salves, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
